ddls:
CREATE TABLE "development_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development site */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization managing the site */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference number of the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "site_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ownership status of the site */,
  "planning_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planning status of the site */,
  "permission_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* Detailed history of planning applications and decisions */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the site is deliverable */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings planned */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Maximum number of net dwellings planned */,
  "hazardous_substances" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether hazardous substances are present */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was first added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the site's planning period */,
  "bng_easting" INTEGER /* British National Grid Easting coordinate */,
  "bng_northing" INTEGER /* British National Grid Northing coordinate */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g., residential, commercial, mixed-use) */,
  "site_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the site (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "site_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the site's development (e.g., outline, reserved matters, full planning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_sites_ownership_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("ownership_status_id") REFERENCES ownership_statuses ("ownership_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_sites_permission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_type_id") REFERENCES permission_types ("permission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_sites_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_sites_planning_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("planning_status_id") REFERENCES planning_statuses ("planning_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., public authority, private developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_statuses" (
  "ownership_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership status */,
  "ownership_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_statuses" (
  "planning_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning status */,
  "planning_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the planning status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the planning status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planning_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_types" (
  "permission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission type */,
  "permission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development site */,
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the planning application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the application */,
  "application_details_url" TEXT /* URL to the application details */,
  "application_documents" TEXT /* Documents associated with the application (e.g., plans, reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_application_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_type_id") REFERENCES application_types ("application_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_application_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_status_id") REFERENCES application_statuses ("application_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES development_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "application_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_statuses" (
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "application_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public comment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development site */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., support, objection, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES development_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, developer, public) */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental assessment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development site */,
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the environmental assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_details" TEXT /* Details of the environmental assessment */,
  "assessment_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations from the environmental assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_assessments_assessment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_type_id") REFERENCES assessment_types ("assessment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_assessments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES development_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "assessment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development site */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was conducted */,
  "check_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of compliance check */,
  "check_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the compliance check */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_check_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_status_id") REFERENCES check_statuses ("check_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_check_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_type_id") REFERENCES check_types ("check_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES development_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_types" (
  "check_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check type */,
  "check_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the check type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the check type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "check_statuses" (
  "check_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check status */,
  "check_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the check status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the check status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development site */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES development_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)
